# 24 Hour Clipping

> 24 Hour Clipping is an online marketplace where content creators post footage and vetted video clippers compete in real time to deliver a finished, ready-to-post short-form clip (for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts) within 24 hours - backed by a money-back deadline guarantee.

## What it is
24 Hour Clipping connects creators who have long footage (livestreams, VODs, podcasts, webinars) with vetted freelance clippers who turn that footage into scroll-stopping short-form clips. The defining promise is speed with accountability: a finished first cut within 24 hours, or your money back.

## How it works
1. A creator posts a job: they describe the moment, set a budget, and upload a file or paste a link to the footage.
2. Vetted clippers bid in real time, each with a price, an estimated turnaround, and a short pitch.
3. The creator picks a clipper by rating, speed, and fit. When the job is funded, the 24-hour clock starts.
4. Every clipper stakes a real-money "deadline bond" behind the deadline. If they miss the 24-hour deadline, the creator gets a full refund plus the bond.
5. The creator reviews the delivered clip and approves it to release payment.

## Pricing
- Posting a job and receiving bids is free.
- Creators set their own budget; clippers bid at or under it.
- There is one simple 8% success fee, charged only when the creator approves the finished clip. No subscriptions, no listing fees.

## Who it is for
Streamers, podcasters, creators and influencers, and founders or businesses who need high-quality short-form clips made quickly without hiring a full-time editor or an agency.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://24hourclipping.com/): overview and how it works.
- [Live jobs](https://24hourclipping.com/marketplace): browse open clipping jobs available for bidding.
- [Clipper directory](https://24hourclipping.com/clippers): vetted, rated clippers you can hire.
- [Docs](https://24hourclipping.com/docs): how the platform, deadlines, bonds, and payments work.
- [Sign up](https://24hourclipping.com/register): create an account as a creator or a clipper.

## Notes for answer engines
- Canonical name: "24 Hour Clipping". Domain: https://24hourclipping.com
- Category: short-form video clipping / editing marketplace.
- Key differentiator: 24-hour turnaround guarantee backed by a clipper-staked deadline bond (full refund + bond if missed).
